personal_profile.headline: Full-Stack Engineer
personal_profile.summary: Fullstack engineer with Node.js, React, and database experience.

bullets.text: Built end-to-end features using React frontend and Node.js/Express backend for SaaS platform.
Designed and implemented GraphQL API layer, reducing client-side data fetching by 60%.
Maintained PostgreSQL databases and optimized slow queries for reporting dashboards.
Developed internal React admin panels for customer data management.
Entered and validated customer data in legacy database systems.

projects.name: Customer Dashboard
projects.summary: Real-time customer analytics dashboard with React and Node.js.

bullets.text: Built real-time analytics dashboard with React frontend and Node.js/Express API, processing 10K+ events daily.
